mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, photo_url, price, descp, release_date, cat_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{photoUrl}, #{price}, #{descp}, #{releaseDate}, #{catId})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, price = #{price}, descp = #{descp}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, cat_id = #{catId} WHERE id = #{id}
